🎉 Create a Board

Send them off
the right way.

A collaborative farewell board your whole team signs — messages, photos, memories — delivered as a keepsake they'll keep forever.

Create a Send-Off BoardHow it works

Flat fee · $5 per board · Unlimited signers · Yours forever

Legacy Card
"Goodbyes aren't the end of a journey — they're the beginning of a legacy carried forward by those you've inspired."
SMJ+14
17 teammates signed
One board · One price$5

How it works

Four simple steps to create the perfect farewell

Create Board

Start a new farewell board & set up the recipient

1Dashboard

Invite Team

Collect messages, GIFs & memories from teammates

2Collaborate

Deliver

Premium cardstock printed & shipped to their door

3Print & Ship

Surprise

Export as PDF, copy link, or share via email

4Share & Reveal

Hover over each card to explore

Global Memory Map

Remote colleagues in Tokyo, London, Lagos, and beyond show up as glowing dots on an interactive map. Tap on a pin or reaction card to engage.

“
A

Aarav Sharma

Lead Engineer📍 New Delhi, India
2 hours ago

“ Wishing you all the very best for the journey ahead. Your leadership, mentorship, and unwavering support have left a lasting impact on the team. You'll be greatly missed, and we hope your next chapter is filled with success and happiness. ”

Celebrate Every Milestone

Choose from 15+ occasion templates to start a board. Hover over a card to begin.
